title: Fix background_spawn: Make it a full LLM call with all tools (same as main chat)
summary: Background agents are currently neutered—they can't access files, browser, memory, or any tools. The fix makes them execute through the main handleChat flow so they get the same full tool access as the main agent, just as a separate LLM call.

affectedFiles.description: Remove tool restriction, pass tools array to background execution, update input interface
